seo.ogTitle: Prosto — social network to find friends and discuss what matters
seo.description: Prosto is a social network for finding friends, joining communities, discussing news, sharing posts, and chatting in direct messages, groups and calls. Minimal, fast and content-focused.
seo.keywords: social network, find friends, communities, discuss news, chat, messaging, posts, feed, groups, calls, prosto

signUp.title: Create an account
signUp.description: Enter your details to get started

errors.emailDisposable: Temporary or disposable email addresses aren't allowed
errors.usernameEdge: Must start and end with a letter or number
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Email not confirmed. Check your inbox.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many login attempts. Try again in {seconds}s.
errors.noAccount: No account found for that email
errors.captchaFailed: Captcha check failed. Please try again.
errors.mustAgree: Please accept the Terms, Privacy Policy and Guidelines to continue
errors.recoverySessionExpired: This reset link has expired. Request a new one.
errors.maxAccounts: You can keep up to {max} accounts on this device.

messages.confirmEmail: We sent a confirmation link. Check your email to sign in.
messages.passwordChanged: Password changed. All other sessions were signed out.
messages.codeSent: We sent a sign-in code to your email. Enter it below.
messages.resetLinkSent: We sent a password reset link to your email.

accounts.addSubtitle: Log in to another account to switch between them on this device.
accounts.agree: I agree to the Terms, Privacy Policy and Guidelines
accounts.maxReached: You've reached the limit of {max} accounts.
accounts.sessionExpired: That account's session expired — add it again.
accounts.switchFailed: Couldn't switch accounts. Please try again.

settings.title: Edit profile
settings.subtitle: Manage your public profile information.
settings.avatarHint: JPG, PNG or GIF · max 5 MB
settings.gifPremiumOnly: GIF avatars are a Super Prosto perk
settings.clientSubtitle: App settings: theme, language and legal info.
settings.styleHint: Choose the overall look of the app.
settings.securityHint: Changing your password signs out all other sessions.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.subtitle: Control who can reach you and see your content.
privacy.messagesDesc: Who may send you direct messages.
privacy.friendReqTitle: Who can add me as a friend
privacy.friendReqDesc: Who may send you a friend request.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Sound and popup preferences.
notifications.soundEnabledDesc: Master switch for all notification sounds.
notifications.toastsEnabledDesc: Show a popup when the app is in the background.
notifications.perServerHint: Per-server settings are managed on each server —

usernames.label: Additional usernames
usernames.hint: Claim extra usernames people can find you by. They appear on your profile and any of them opens your profile.
usernames.limitReached: You've reached the maximum of {max} usernames.
usernames.premiumNote: Add up to 5 usernames with Super Prosto.

errors.notPremium: Additional usernames are a Super Prosto perk.

account.title: My Account
account.subtitle: Manage your sign-in details and account security.
account.securityHint: Changing your password signs out all other sessions.
account.deleteHint: Deleting your account is permanent. All of your data will be erased forever.
account.deleteWarning: This cannot be undone. Your profile, posts, comments, all direct messages and groups will be permanently deleted, and you'll be removed from everyone's friends list. Enter your password to confirm.

profile.hiddenBody: This user has hidden their profile.
profile.hiddenBodyFriends: Only their friends can view this profile.
profile.botNoContent: This is a bot. Bots don't have posts, followers, or friends — they respond to slash commands.

verified.title: Verified account
verified.description: This account is verified as official.

connections.title: Connections
connections.subtitle: Link your accounts to show them on your profile.

super.name: Super Prosto
super.subtitle: Super Prosto subscription perks.
super.perk1Desc: An animated aurora gradient on your name across the whole app.
super.perk2Desc: An exclusive Super badge next to your name.
super.perk3Desc: Send messages and images that delete themselves automatically.
super.perk4Desc: Set direct messages to clear themselves automatically.
super.perk5Desc: Your own background in direct messages.
super.perk7Desc: A living GIF avatar and banner on your profile.
super.perk8Desc: Stop others from forwarding your messages.
super.perk9Desc: Claim up to 5 different usernames — people can find you by any of them.
super.unlockSubtitle: Animated GIF avatars & banners are a Super Prosto perk — along with everything else:

download.title: Prosto for desktop
download.subtitle: A standalone app with notifications and quick access.

compose.title: New post
compose.tooMany: You can attach up to {max} files
compose.uploadFailed: Couldn't upload one of the files

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

social.notAcceptingFriends: This user isn't accepting friend requests
social.friendsOnlyRequests: Only their friends can send them requests
social.cannotMessage: This user doesn't accept messages from you

friends.title: Friends
friends.inviteHint: Share this link — it adds you as a friend.

invite.ogDesc: Open to add {name} as a friend on Prosto.
invite.ogDescGeneric: Open to become friends on Prosto.
invite.question: Add {name} as a friend?
invite.subtitle: You'll become friends and a direct chat opens.
invite.notFound: This invite was not found or has expired.
invite.self: This is your own invite link.
invite.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

messages.selectConversationHint: Message someone from their profile page
messages.quickSwitcherPlaceholder: Where would you like to go?
messages.sendNotAllowed: This user doesn't accept your messages
messages.slashBotCannotSend: This bot can't reply here — it needs the Send Messages permission in this channel.
messages.slashRateLimited: You're running commands too fast. Wait a moment.
messages.createGroupHint: Add at least one friend to the group.
messages.dmStart: This is the beginning of your conversation with {name}.
messages.groupStart: This is the start of the {name} group.
messages.blockedByYou: You cannot send messages to a user you have blocked.
messages.cannotSendBlocked: You can't send messages to this user because they have blocked you.
messages.editHint: Enter to save · Esc to cancel
messages.rateLimited: Too many messages. Please slow down.

cooldown.title: Too fast
cooldown.subtitle: Have a cup of tea and take a little break.

feed.trendingEmpty: Nothing trending yet. Check back soon.
feed.empty: No posts yet. Be the first!
feed.followingEmpty: Follow people to see their posts here.

search.hasTitle: Includes a specific type of data

age.title: Add your date of birth
age.description: A new safety step. Existing members are asked once; new accounts enter it at sign-up. Set it to unlock 18+ content — it can't be changed later, and the minimum age is 13.
age.immutableNote: Set once — can't be changed later.
age.serverNsfwLocked: You must be 18+ to enable this.
age.err_tooYoung: You must be at least 13 to use Prosto.
age.err_alreadySet: Your date of birth is already set.
age.err_invalid: Enter a valid date of birth.
age.err_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
age.restrictedBody: You must be 18 or older to view this.
age.channelNsfwHint: Only members 18 or older can open this channel.
age.serverNsfwHint: Only members 18 or older can access this server.
age.signUpTooYoung: You must be at least 13 years old

home.heading: Talking made simple
home.description: Messages, groups, calls and a feed. Nothing extra.
home.featuresLead: A feed, servers, group chats and calls — one calm, fast app instead of five.
home.feedText: Post, like, repost and follow. A calm timeline of the people and topics you actually care about.
home.serversText: Spin up servers with channels, roles and custom emoji. Talk with everyone, about anything.
home.dmsText: Direct messages, group chats and crystal-clear calls. Fast, private and simple.
home.discoverText: Browse public communities and jump into the conversation in seconds.
home.ctaText: Join the conversation with people all over the world.
home.footerTagline: Talk to the whole world. Simply.
home.previewFeedText: What do you think of my cat?
home.previewMsg1: wanna go for a walk today?
home.previewHytaleDesc: The official Hytale server. Embark on a journey of adventure and creativity!
home.previewOpenaiDesc: The official OpenAI server—connect, explore, and engage with others on ChatGPT, Codex, and OpenAI's latest models.
home.previewWalkerDesc: The Official Alan Walker Server. Let's unite, Walkers!

servers.discoverSearchPlaceholder: Search by name, description or tag (e.g. minecraft)
servers.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell people what this server is about…
servers.tagsHint: Up to 6 tags. Press Enter or comma to add. Used in search.
servers.publicHint: Listed in discovery — anyone can find and join.
servers.emojiHint: Upload your own emojis: up to 100 static and 50 GIF, each up to 512 KB.
servers.emojiNameOptional: Optional — for multiple files the name is taken from the file name.
servers.emojiDropzoneHint: or click to browse · several at once
servers.emojiBadName: Name must be 2–32 chars: letters, digits, underscore.
servers.emojiDuplicate: An emoji with that name already exists.
servers.rolePreviewMsg: Hey everyone! This is how my role looks in chat.
servers.roleGradientHint: Blend a second colour into the name.
servers.roleGlowHint: A soft backlight behind the name.
servers.roleHoistHint: Show members with this role in their own section above others.
servers.aboutPlaceholder: Tell people what this server is about…
servers.whiteboardHintShared: Shared for everyone — press Save to publish your changes.
servers.whiteboardReadonly: Only server managers can draw here.
servers.noSendPermission: You don't have permission to send messages here

permDesc.MANAGE_SERVER: Edit the server's name, icon, banner and settings.
permDesc.MANAGE_CHANNELS: Create, edit, delete and reorder channels.
permDesc.CREATE_INVITE: Create invite links to the server.
permDesc.CHANGE_THEME: Set a background wallpaper for channels.
permDesc.BAN: Permanently ban members (account + IP) and manage the ban list.
permDesc.TIMEOUT: Mute members for a set time — they can't send anywhere.
permDesc.MANAGE_INVITES: View, delete and pause the server's invite links.
permDesc.ADMINISTRATOR: Grants every permission and bypasses all channel restrictions. Give with care.

permNote.MANAGE_ROLES: Members can't grant a role higher than their own.

servers.createSubtitle: Give your server a name — you can change it later.
servers.name: Server name
servers.adminGrantsAll: Administrator grants every permission — the other toggles are locked on while it's enabled.
servers.invitesIntro: Anyone with an invite link can join. Delete a link to revoke it, or pause invites entirely.
servers.pauseUntilOn: Pause until I turn them on
servers.invitesPausedIndef: Invites are paused until you turn them back on.
servers.inviteShareHint: Share this link — anyone with it can join the server.
servers.banNote: Bans apply to the account and its last known IP. Someone can still get around an IP ban with a proxy.
servers.transferWarn: You will give full ownership of this server to {name} and lose the owner role yourself. This can't be undone.
servers.bansIntro: Bans apply to the account and its last known IP. A user can get around an IP ban with a proxy.
servers.banSearchPlaceholder: Search bans by user ID or username
servers.noBansHint: You haven't banned anybody — but if and when you must, don't hesitate.

permOverride.channelDescription: Fine-tune what each role can do in this channel. Channel overrides win over category ones.
permOverride.categoryDescription: Set defaults for every channel in this category. Individual channels can override or fully re-sync back.
permOverride.noRoles: No overrides yet. Pick a role to start.
permOverride.syncConfirm: Drop all channel-specific overrides and inherit from the category?

servers.channelStart: This is the start of the #{name} channel.
servers.inviteEmbedTitle: You've been invited to join a server
servers.vanityHint: 2–20 characters: lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens.
servers.inviteHint: Share this link to let people join the server.
servers.deleteConfirm: Delete for sure? This can't be undone.
servers.leaveHint: You'll leave this server. You can only return with a new invite.
servers.joinSubtitle: You'll become a member of the server.
servers.inviteNotFound: This invite was not found or has expired.
servers.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
servers.ogDesc: Open to join the {name} server on Prosto.
servers.ogDescGeneric: Open to join a server on Prosto.

admin.title: Admin
admin.dashboardSubtitle: Activity and growth at a glance.
admin.metric_online_desc: Distinct users seen in the last 5 minutes.
admin.metric_dau_desc: Users active in the last 24 hours.
admin.metric_mau_desc: Users active in the last 30 days.
admin.noHistoryHint: This metric is recorded over time as users are active. Come back after the app has been running for a while.
admin.usersSubtitle: Search users and manage their roles.
admin.systemNote: Metrics reflect this Node process only. Behind a single-process pm2 deploy this is the whole app; in cluster mode each worker reports separately.
admin.noLatencyHistory: No latency history yet — it accrues from active heartbeats.

developers.title: Developers
developers.botsSubtitle: Build bots that respond to slash commands in your servers and DMs.
developers.usernameHint: 3–30 chars, lowercase letters, digits and underscores.
developers.avatarUploadHint: JPG, PNG or WebP, up to 5 MB.
developers.avatarLaterHint: You can upload an avatar after creating the bot.
developers.emptyBots: You haven't created any bots yet.
developers.tokenRevealBody: This is the only time we'll show it. Store it somewhere safe — if you lose it, revoke it and create a new one.
developers.tokenRevealAck: I've copied my token and stored it safely.
developers.tokensIntro: Tokens let your bot's code authenticate. Keep them secret; revoke any that leak.
developers.commandsCodeHint: Commands are defined in your bot's code and synced automatically via PUT /api/v1/commands.
developers.noCommandsYet: No commands registered yet. Define them in your bot's code.
developers.serversIntro: Add your bot to servers you own so members can use its slash commands there.
developers.notInAnyServer: This bot isn't in any server yet.
developers.deleteBotBody: Permanently deletes the bot, its tokens, commands and account. This cannot be undone.

error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error.unauthenticated: You need to be signed in.
error.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please slow down.
error.add_failed: Couldn't add the bot to that server.
error.usernameInvalidChars: Use only lowercase letters, digits and underscores.
error.usernameEdge: Username must start and end with a letter or digit.
